name: Sri Satya Lokesh
headline: Lead Engineer · Solutions Architect, Agentic AI Developer
bio: Lead Engineer with over 7 years of expertise in architecting scalable platforms, AI-driven automation, and enterprise-grade systems. I have a proven track record of mentoring 18+ engineers and leading technical initiatives for high-scale platforms supporting 350K+ live customers. Passionate about event-driven architectures and full-stack innovation.

description: Architecting high-scale platforms supporting 350K+ live customers, ensuring high availability and performance.
Leading cross-functional engineering teams and driving strategic technical initiatives across the organization.
Designing enterprise-grade systems with a focus on scalability, security, and developer experience.
Mentoring 18+ engineers through technical leadership, code reviews, and architectural guidance.
Built multi-tenant conversational AI platforms utilizing Rasa, Dialogflow, and Microsoft Bot Framework.
Developed core automation engines that significantly reduced manual overhead and improved system efficiency.
Architected notification systems capable of handling high-velocity event-driven traffic.
Collaborated on the transition from legacy systems to modern, scalable microservices.
Focused on automation and internal tool development using Python and shell scripting.
Streamlined development workflows by creating custom utilities for engineering teams.
Assisted in testing and debugging complex software modules within the Synopsys ecosystem.
Specialized in software architecture and automated systems.
Completed internship at Synopsys focusing on internal tooling and Python automation.
Developed a strong foundation in data structures, algorithms, and system design.

projects.title: Customer Experience Platform
projects.description: A high-scale platform for telecom operations supporting hundreds of thousands of concurrent users with real-time analytics and management.

projects.title: Event-Driven Notification Platform
projects.description: An elite, scalable notification engine built on event-driven architecture to handle high-velocity message delivery across multiple channels.

projects.title: Multi-Tenant Chatbot Automation
projects.description: Advanced conversational AI system achieves 40% reduction in support calls for massive customer bases via Rasa and Dialogflow integration.

recommendations.text: Sri Satya Lokesh's expertise and dedication were key assets to our Commercial NDS project. I highly recommend him for any technical leadership role.
recommendations.name: Chad Baumann
recommendations.title: Systems Project Manager @ Ziply Fiber

recommendations.text: Lokesh is a dependable engineer with deep expertise in scalable backend systems. His work at Dhan AI has been exemplary.

recommendations.text: Lokesh's impact on our customer experience applications has been significant. He is a truly talented solutions architect.
